creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Steven Apologies for the delay. This needs a .1 bump and dependencies to be updated (made OPTION'al) [1]. These also applied to the previous release, and may need to wait for a cryptography 3.0.0 update (since the cryptography dep is currently unconditional).

[1] https://github.com/oauthlib/oauthlib/blob/v3.1.1/setup.py#L19-L21
